3153760.name: Zombies & Survivors
3153760.description:
Escape the Apocalypse in Zombies & Survivors!


In a world overrun by the undead, you aren't a hero: you're a mercenary.
With a shotgun in one hand and a thirst for cash in the other,
you rescue survivors from the clutches of the apocalypse... for a price.
Compassion doesn't pay the bills, but desperate people do.

Controls

Arrow keys / WASD ............................................Move
Mouse Left Button.............................................Shoot
Mouse Right Button / Escape...................................Pause game
Mouse Pointer.................................................Aim

Features
  • 8 missions
  • 7 weapons
  • open world composed of 25 x 25 screens
